textByHash.7f62e99c09b645e5d385e877f15cdde1d003bcff: Soon, all will bow down before me!
textByHash.a7214165e0ac6372236a2278002911222c7c2813: Agrith-Naar will make us the rulers of the world! I shall be a dark queen over all Gielinor! All shall love me and despair!
textByHash.ac748fc7fa6f20bf6e766702451baa570dd93abe: Ah ha ha ha ha ha!!
textByHash.2c451d1587d7dcef4abe094c6102b7057e09c601: AAH HA HA HA HA HA HAAAAA!!!!
textByHash.ff74c17b0448a2a89b3615b8ad265f31dd3e33b3: Hah! Carrying such humble implements is beneath me!
textByHash.99a4863c9dcbdfd8e1c9f229495fb87930e8a172: He was a fool who could not cope with power! When Agrith-Naar makes us rulers of continents, I will find him and crush him!
textByHash.6a9c693736b35e7782674c12fbf0be3be390dde1: Get to your place in the circle and lead the ritual! I'm so excited!
textByHash.59d5e7e93acf1fa430fc1ba7a8ec5c97e26195fe: You don't seem very sure. We don't want any infected near the children. Be off with you!
textByHash.01a9372878be50f29b3e635be06bc843985b9450: Whatever it is you're selling, we ain't interested!
textByHash.cd3f0f29c97eb76f43df6ec2be2199aede672ce0: Did you not hear me? Clear off!
